item.title: MASS EFFECT BODY PAINT MCROFT07
item.description: I'm on twitch most of the time btw PLEASE find me on https://linktr.ee/mcroft07 since I only post a small selection of my work here. Doing my first playthrough of mass effect and loved the design of femshep so I wanted to paint her immediately! The liara hologram is my previous body paint of her and I vfx'd that as well as the ending myself :) Anyway the lasso took me forever to edit in after effects but I'm glad I did it because I was learning new skills :) fuck gen ai Faq: I use body paint and do these in a mirror I have patreon now and I do some of my dream projects on there! I'm really excited about it, I am also doing some bigger cosplay builds! No, it is not AI. I do not use AI at all in any of my videos. I just looked at pictures and did what I wanted with the design tbh. I use professional body paint covers (pasties) this means I am not wearing a top but I am also not naked. I paint myself, I make the props myself, I film myself, and I also edit. This is my full time thing now (yayy) I paint these by looking in a mirror, with brushes, and paint It takes between 6-12 hours each Body painting myself is my hobby/passion I do own clothes It doesn’t tickle “Why don’t you just wear clothes” once again, body painting myself is my hobby/passion. I am painting my skin, I am not wearing a suit - but that does not mean I am naked. I know, even I think this is a ridiculous set of questions I have to constantly answer I did not go to art school, I am self taught. Talent gets you so far, but this is a learned skill. Thank you to everyone who wants to help me with VPNs etc but please note that I am highly concerned about someone doxxing me so I will not accept any offer on this. I also don't want to pay for a VPN to use ONE website, so I just click through until I can get through, if I can get through, post and interact with the community for a while then turn it off. This is a real threat to me, I have been grabbed in the streets and had people attempt to follow me home before, so I take safety online and offline very seriously. The paint isn’t edible (gross) I've been painting myself for 16 years. The 07 does not mean I was born in 2007, UK 7 is my shoe size No, I don't need help painting my back, I don't want to paint my back, I don't need to paint my back. (also gross) No, I don't need help washing it off. (also you are gross) If you want to see more I am MCroft07 on IG, twitter, Tiktok, YouTube I paint them live on twitch I like doing the lip syncs, they're fun for me while I paint them. I couldn’t care less if you think they’re cringe. I am cringe but I am free My tattoos on my ribs are from Tomb Raider - I am a big TR fan I do not have an OF but if you want to send me money THAT badly you can just tip my twitch account. Haha. The shower afterwards takes about 15 minutes, I use a regular sponge and shower gel. The reason why it can look different at the end is because I am wearing a wig, I promise you it is not a different person because the hair changed. While on this topic, if my eyes change colour it’s because I am wearing contact lenses. (Those with an IQ above 10… I know. Even I’m shocked the wig thing is a frequent comment). I use body paint. It doesn’t tickle, I am very ticklish and this is fine. I don’t have an allergic reaction to the paint, but if you do it, you should always do a patch test first I do not know where you can buy body paint in every country. I know in the UK it is available at FacePaintingshop.com. I use a plethora of different brands, it’s best to search for them yourself online. I don’t work in Hollywood, I don’t want to. I just want to improve my body painting for myself. I am English, not American. I do not go outside like this to scare people. 1, that would be very cold. 2, in this current age, everyone would take photos without me knowing and it would likely dox me :)))))) I’m not a sweaty person, but if I was this would be a lot more difficult. Thank you to those of you who came from Imgur to my Twitch channel! “What’s the point in painting yourself when you can wear clothes?” all my clothes are in the laundry, had to resort to this, tough life It would not be quicker to jump into a pool of paint - think of the drying time?! I don’t care that I wash it off at the end, I get to reuse this canvas, we love a reduce, reuse, recycle queen. I am not the lady who did the Maneskin video, it’s a cool video and she slayed, but it isn’t me. No it isn't AI, I fucking hate AI I used to do nothing with my hands and people told me I wasn't really painting, so I started painting bits while lip syncing and while recording and doing the transitions and people still hate it so honestly go fuck yourself and don't watch my shit then you're boring I can promise you there is not *a man* painting these and I am pretending to paint myself. I am genuinely painting myself. If you're still here, I'm on holiday in Canada and it's very nice! I bought a 17kg watermelon today and I am so full of watermelon I can't move To everyone who thinks I paint it "wrong" you do it, show me it and I will critique it. The difference is that I will try and put myself out there, I respect artists to grow themselves and find their own way and style because I am an artist, not some blindsided bystander buffoon who thinks they know more about a subject they've never tried. Check yourself with your unsolicited advice and criticism. On that topic, I can handle criticism which is usually the defence people take when I point out that I did not ask. I know a lot of you don’t like reading this faq because it is horrid to see that I have to answer all of these. Unfortunately I have noticed that when I don’t put in all the icky things then I get more gross comments and I just have to spend more time blocking people so it’s better to call it out. I just copy and paste it each time anyway.
item.dc:creator: MCroft07

item.dc:creator: thebigbaka

item.title: On July 6th, Ukraine struck Russia's largest oil refinery
item.description:
On July 6th 2026, Ukraine used Fire Point FP-1 drones, whose range was upgraded from 1,600 km (994 mi) to 3,400 km (2112 mi), to strike Russia's largest oil refinery in Omsk, southwestern Siberia: https://www.themoscowtimes.com/2026/07/06/ukraine-strikes-russias-largest-oil-refinery-in-western-siberia-a93177 Omsk is situated about 2,500 kilometers (1,550 miles) from the Ukrainian border. The Omsk refinery processed over 22 million tons of oil in 2025. Data from before the war against Ukraine showed that it supplied 11.5% of Russia's domestic fuel demand, a share that most likely rose significantly after the start of the war as Omsk Refinery had, so far, been out of reach of Ukrainian aircrafts while other refineries fell behind their production quota due to strikes by Ukrainian drones and missiles. The relatively slow FP-1 drones, which posses no stealth-capabilities, had to fly over Russian territory for around 15 hours to reach Omsk, which shows that Russia seriously struggles to maintain any form of control over its own air space. The strike also marks the deepest strike into Russia by Ukraine yet, surpassing the former record of about 2,000 km by 500 km.
Please consider donating to Ukraine using the official government website: https://u24.gov.ua/
item.dc:creator: DerpMeister

item.title: GovBrief Today #522
item.description: The office ICE created to investigate its own agents is instead investigating 131 Americans for criticizing the agency. David Streever is believed to be one of the 131. Two agents visited his Rochester home over an angry email and handed his wife a formal warning that he may have violated federal law. They later tracked him to the New York City hotel where he and his 7-year-old daughter stopped on the way home from a vacation. Today he filed a federal lawsuit asking a court to declare these warning notices unconstitutional. This is the office charged with making sure detention facilities are safe for the more than 60,000 people locked inside them. Someone in ICE custody has died every ten days under this administration, and the number of inspection reports has fallen by nearly half. Despite that record, investigators traveled to Rochester because a man sent an email they didn't like. I've emailed 8,117 stories over 522 straight nights, free and without ads. The algorithm can't show them all to you. Add your email address at govbrief.today and I will. Subscribe (It's free!): https://gbounacos.substack.com/ Today's full brief: https://go.govbrief.today/260706-full [1] https://go.govbrief.today/iran-war-july6 [2] https://go.govbrief.today/uspstf-meeting [3] https://go.govbrief.today/ice-131-cases [4] https://go.govbrief.today/trump-walmart [5] https://go.govbrief.today/pipe-bomber-ruling [6] https://go.govbrief.today/texas-age [7] https://go.govbrief.today/ice-payouts [8] https://go.govbrief.today/trump-helipad [9] https://go.govbrief.today/platner-accusation [10] https://go.govbrief.today/mcconnell-3weeks [11] https://go.govbrief.today/hsin-hack [12] https://go.govbrief.today/abq-housing [13] https://go.govbrief.today/ice-critic-sues Subscribe (It's free!): https://gbounacos.substack.com/
item.dc:creator: GeorgeBounacos

item.title: Dumps of Unusual Size 301: More Unsorted Memes, Part Six
item.description:
"I’m not the world’s greatest expert, but I would have thought the wizards, witches, trolls… would have given her a clue." --Sir Terry Pratchett, mocking J.K. Rowling’s claim that she did not write fantasy
I think this is the original (or very early) board for Monopoly before Parker Brothers got their hands on it.
Be excellent to each other.
Previous Unsorted Meme Dumps: https://imgur.com/gallery/dumps-of-unusual-size-296-more-unsorted-memes-part-one-OKU0Qq5 https://imgur.com/gallery/dumps-of-unusual-size-297-more-unsorted-memes-part-two-9IDS6Ip https://imgur.com/gallery/dumps-of-unusual-size-298-more-unsorted-memes-part-three-4GF1u82 https://imgur.com/gallery/dumps-of-unusual-size-299-more-unsorted-memes-part-four-Tq3TzIK https://imgur.com/gallery/dumps-of-unusual-size-300-more-unsorted-memes-part-five-DAvj92Q https://imgur.com/gallery/dumps-of-unusual-size-175-unsorted-memes-part-one-5otMcCN https://imgur.com/gallery/dumps-of-unusual-size-176-unsorted-memes-part-two-ZHWudsD https://imgur.com/gallery/dumps-of-unusual-size-177-unsorted-memes-part-three-E6hiogu https://imgur.com/gallery/dumps-of-unusual-size-178-unsorted-memes-part-four-5emouti https://imgur.com/gallery/dumps-of-unusual-size-179-unsorted-memes-part-five-F7izf2U https://imgur.com/gallery/dumps-of-unusual-size-180-unsorted-memes-part-six-xPXzAuO https://imgur.com/gallery/dumps-of-unusual-size-181-unsorted-memes-part-seven-RTOkdC0 https://imgur.com/gallery/dumps-of-unusual-size-182-unsorted-memes-part-eight-HopxAiO https://imgur.com/gallery/dumps-of-unusual-size-183-unsorted-memes-part-nine-Ox3FvFv https://imgur.com/gallery/dumps-of-unusual-size-184-unsorted-memes-part-ten-DF2KNvU https://imgur.com/gallery/dumps-of-unusual-size-185-unsorted-memes-part-eleven-cQ6RjD3 https://imgur.com/gallery/dumps-of-unusual-size-186-unsorted-memes-part-twelve-jBbsvwG
item.dc:creator: Schadwen

item.title: Travel lightly little drone! - To Omsk, russia 2500kms from Ukraine.
item.description:
Aaand it arrived (in the largest russian refinery)
The gang was already there. I hope they had as much fun as we have watching this. (8 drones were sent, one was shot down, seven arrived) 2500 km (straight-line distance) reach for Ukrainian drones means that also the largest oil fields of russia are not safe anymore. Over all the newest version of the FP-1 seems to be able to fly 3500 kms Go Ukraine!
In fact it flew something around 3000 kms because .. reasons. ___________ More details from Drone Bomber - @DrnBmbr (on T*) below: - quote Drone Route to the Omsk Oil Refinery After analyzing Russian monitoring channels and local chat groups, we reconstructed the following route. Kazan was the last point where the Russians still had any meaningful air defense coverage and radar tracking. Once the drones passed that area, all information about them disappeared. Russian monitoring channels simply "lost" the drones and from that point onward issued only yellow alerts (potential UAV threat without confirmed tracking). This says a great deal about the actual state of Russian air defenses along the rest of the route. The drones covered approximately 2,800–3,000 km, depending on the estimate. The strike involved upgraded FP-1 attack drones equipped with redesigned wings that were longer and featured a modified aerodynamic profile. According to eyewitness reports and available footage, there were seven impacts at the Omsk Oil Refinery, including hits on two distillation columns. Russian forces reportedly deployed an A-50 AEW&C aircraft to provide radar support and a Su-57 fighter in an attempt to intercept the drones. Based on currently available information, only one out of eight drones was shot down. There was no meaningful air defense around the target. No surface-to-air missile launches or air defense systems were observed in operation—only small-arms fire. The drones approached the facility with little interference, arriving one after another. Even the protective netting that Russian forces had installed around parts of the refinery proved ineffective. They were well aware that this facility was a potential target. It was the only major refinery that had not yet been struck and one of Russia's key fuel production sites, supplying many regions across the country. Either they did not believe Ukrainian drones were capable of flying more than 2,500 km, or they placed too much confidence in those protective nets. I won't go into detail about the route itself. I'll simply say that it reflects a well-planned and carefully executed long-range strike operation. I have not yet seen any detailed Russian analysis of the mission, and there is no reason to reveal our own. Excellent work. - unquote
In a dramatic escalation of long-range warfare, Russia’s Novosibirsk region in Siberia declared a drone alert for the first time since the start of the full-scale conflict. The region sits an astonishing 3,500 kilometers (over 2,100 miles) away from the Ukrainian border, signaling a massive expansion in the reach of Ukraine's aerial capabilities. https://news.az/news/russia-issues-first-ever-drone-alert-in-siberia
item.dc:creator: vladrichdemaclant

item.title: Bless Her Heart
item.description: Well, bless her heart! Miss Lindsey must have had a right powerful case of the vapors and pitched a conniption fit and a hissy fit at the same dang time. Ah do declare she’s really stepped in the stinky poo this time. Was she tryin’ to distract us from those naughty files by mentioning them? Miss Lindsey has sorely miscalculated and needs to fix this expeditiously, if not sooner.

item.title: Cat Allergies [OC]
item.description:
Sponsored by Pacagen! I know, I know! The cat mom comics lady is allergic to cats?! But it’s true! I’d given up any hope of owning a cat, but then the science came through for me! You see, it’s not actually the dander we’re allergic to, but certain proteins that get stuck to it. By adding a tiny amount of Pacagen powder to my cats' food, those proteins are neutralized at the source, so they can’t go floating around the house and up my nose! I’ve been a Pacagen customer for a while, and liked the product so much I asked them if I could do this comic in return for some precious kitty cuddlin’ powder! Wow what a difference it makes!
Get your Pacagen Allergy Reducing Powder here! https://pacagen.com/en-us/products/cat-allergen-reducing-supplement
item.dc:creator: LitterboxComics

item.title: The Evolution of 'Trap'
item.description: This week I take a deep dive into my weird history with Reddit, and why it's all mostly bots now... Bots forever... Check out the whole convo here: https://youtu.be/nuR_87oDT7c Disclaimer: My YouTube content revenue all goes to Trans charities - I put this cause this is my art I make and love sharing with you all here, and folks have been getting weird about it lately.

item.title: I really can not grasp that she is so racistly angry that she can just "absentmindedly" swing her dog around like that.
item.description: when my dog is with me in public, my concern is 100% about maintaining his safety & wellbeing. If I got jumped, I'd be trying to protect him first. If I saw a car barreling towards me, I'd throw my dog out of the way before myself. If I was hungry, he'd get snackos first... Then there's this broad just tossing her accessory around cause she needed to get a few hits in. SMH ⁷
item.dc:creator: Jamesstin

item.title: Let's see how this goes
item.description: I was talking to a coworker about the live action One Piece (that I also like) and the conversation moved to Cowboy Bebop. I know it heavily diverted from the anime (I've watched that several times since I was a kid) but I liked it. Also, I think the casting was solid.
item.dc:creator: PleaseRespectMyAsshole

item.title: Return of the Meme: 1740 (owl with a chainsaw)
item.description:
Lets get this bread
I dreamed I knew the world was going to be destroyed by a decent chunk of antimatter in a given amount of time (about an hour or two?) and I had to gather 15 people to keep the species alive and aliens would rescue us and carry us elsewhere and I'm like: "Bruh, the best fifteen people i would select pretty much dont want to have kids. Also there is no way that would be a healthy genetic founding population. Unless you have some sort of magic tech, you'd need a minimum of 100 people. And these 15 people I'd choose are not even local to me. I think you misunderstand the nature of how fucked up our society is." "Either choose someone else and a proper number, or leave us alone and let us as a species and a world die. But if you have tech for me to bring my 15 best friends to me to watch the world end with a couple of six-packs and some bottles from my apocalypse stash, I will accept." Cue a time skip and me and 15 friends drinking out in the Utah desert watching a hunk of antimatter crash into the earth and us singing Tom Lehrer.
Different West African alphabetic scripts
I have joked about if I was absurdly rich, I would own a replica Drakkar [Norse longship] and raid houseboats in Lake Powell
Heheheheheheh
Harvesters by Vincent Van Gogh. Probably not the exact name of the painting but I just woke up and have not had enough coffee to trundle through internet searching.
Yeah that tracks with the people I know
Pippin tax Today's message from Pippin: "I [undecipherable conure jibberish] good boy Pippin" ___ 1) Are you on the run to a safe place and passing through Arizona on your way to safer grounds? My apartment is open to you to crash at, and it is a safe space. Pippin and I will make you a meal and gladly share tea, wine, or mead with you. 2) Hey! Take your meds with a full glass of water, please. Do it for Pippin, or Space Mom, or better yet, do it for yourself. 3) Ĝefeloað wē. We will carry on. 4) all funds from the sales of items at these two links will be sent to support charities aiding to fight for Trans rights in the US (not just T-shirts!) https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74812801-all-conures-are-anarchists https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74811778-whiptail-pride 5) Since multiple people have requested this over the last two weeks or so, my ko-fi is: https://ko-fi.com/codyandpippin
item.dc:creator: CodyBurkett
